query: SELECT firstName, lastName, company, title, email, enrichedEmail, enrichedTitle, enrichedLinkedin, score FROM campaignContacts WHERE tier = 'tier1_hot' AND enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' ORDER BY score DESC;
